text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Oh, is my bow crooked?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Nope, it's perfect!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I see Silence Suzuka and her friends<n>in the dance
studio. They're doing a<n>dress rehearsal for the
celebration<n>concert.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, should we make sure we can do<n>all our
dance moves properly in these<n>outfits?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. Let's rehearse "Never<n>Looking
Back." I'll go call the backup<n>dancers!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That was so much fun! Everyone's<n>moves were
really cool!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... It was like a sea of blue in the<n>mirror...
And when we danced we<n>looked like rolling
waves of blue and<n>white.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It made my heart beat so fast.<n>That's
how the audience is going to<n>see us, huh...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We better make sure our singing is<n>on par with
our dance skills!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Is that really enough though?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This celebration concert is different<n>from winning
concerts, right? It's a<n>super special event...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And it's like someone once said, "A<n>show is
incomplete until the audience<n>is involved." It'll
probably be kinda like<n>that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I think I get it. The real thing will feel<n>completely
different from practice.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so how about we try to imagine<n>what it's
going to be like during the<n>actual show?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then we can sing our hearts out, like<n>it's the real
deal!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Visualization training! I think that's a<n>wonderful
idea. Let's try it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the concert, and we're<n>waiting
just off stage... I think the<n>opening
announcement could be any<n>second now...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there's the announcement!<n>Oooh... Gosh, I'm
so nervous...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Finally, the music's turned down.<n>Listen, the
whole venue's practically<n>silent.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
There's the opening movie playing...<n>And it's
over.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Okay, it's time for the concert! Let's<n>hit the
stage!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
We stand onstage and before us is...<n>a sea of
lights, a rainbow of colors.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: It's so beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can hear the audience clapping for<n>us... Oh my
gosh, I'm getting<n>goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Within the sea of lights is the crowd...<n>It's an
incredible sight. Seeing that<n>scenery, I feel a
power welling up<n>inside me, as if I could soar up
into the<n>air.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I feel like I can sing until the<n>end of time!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Well, it was all in our imagination, so<n>I'm not sure
how the crowd looked...<n>but I hope they smile
during the real<n>show.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, we're gonna put smiles onall their faces!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I hope we put on a<n>performance even
more wonderful<n>than we can imagine.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay, once more from the top!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The singers practice with all their<n>passion. The
celebration concert is set<n>to be as fiery and
intense as the<n>summer sun itself!
